_doc: Allowlist for the no-orphan-module probe (#85, T7 in the v0.15.0
rollout).  Modules listed here are intentionally not imported by
any production call site and are kept around as utilities or
fixtures.  Adding to this list requires a justification line.

no_orphan_module.vn_faker: Faker-style generator for Vietnamese test data; consumed only by tests + downstream demos.
no_orphan_module.vn_error_translator: VN-localised error message helper; consumed only by tests + downstream demos.
